title: hypericum wardianum
intro: Hypericum wardianum, also known as Ward's St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hypericum wardianum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Hypericum wardianum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
